name: exPDite-2: A Phase 3 Study to Assess the Efficacy and Safety of Midbrain Dopaminergic Neuronal Cell Therapy (Bemdaneprocel) for Participants With Parkinson's Disease
summary: A ClinicalTrials.gov phase 3 registry entry for bemdaneprocel in Parkinson disease, recruiting with no posted results as of the June 5, 2026 posted update.
